title.en: The Dragon Shadow Palace Lord took the lead and...

content.en:
Rumble!!!!

The Dragon Shadow Palace Lord took the lead and blocked Ye Tian.

And the Thunder Tribulation Palace Master also rushed into the Forbidden Void Realm, wanting to catch Ouyang Jiu'er first.

I have to say that the idea of the Dragon Shadow Palace Lord and the Thunder Tribulation Palace Lord is very good, if the other Returning Realm Half-Step Domain Ancestors face the Dragon Shadow Palace Lord and the Thunder Tribulation Palace Master, then this plan will definitely succeed.

But they forgot that Ye Tian still had the ability to copy his body.

......

Forbidden Void Realm.

As soon as the Thunder Tribulation Palace Lord arrived, another figure also descended.

This person was wearing a black robe, wearing the mask of Black Wind Mountain, and his cultivation was also at the half-step domain ancestor level.

"Dark King, no, you are the doppelganger of the Ten Thousand Laws Dao Ancestor!"

The Thunder Tribulation Palace Master was shocked.

"Get out!"

Ye Tian's copy body made a move, and as soon as he made a move, he exerted the power of the Extreme Dao, bursting out with the combat power of the top Guiyi Realm half-step domain ancestor.

Bang !!

The Thunder Tribulation Palace Master was sent flying, his body was cracked, and he was actually injured, although it was a slight injury, but I had to admit that Ye Tian's strength was much stronger than that of the Thunder Tribulation Palace Master.

"Your clone can even exert the combat power of the top Returning One Realm half-step domain ancestor!!!

The Thunder Tribulation Palace Master was shocked.

Before, during the battle with the Devouring Clan, Ye Tiandu was about to fall, and the clone did not appear!

At that time, he thought that Ye Tian's clone was not strong, and the root was not the strength of the body, so it was useless to send it out.

But he never expected that Ye Tian's clone would appear again, and he also had the combat power of the top Guiyi Realm half-step domain ancestor.

It's so weird!

The other side.

Ye Tian's body fought with the Dragon Shadow Palace Master, and beat the Dragon Shadow Palace Master.

At this time, the other half-step domain ancestors of the Heavenly Emperor Palace did not dare to plug in at all, after all, Ye Tian could kill an ordinary half-step domain ancestor in an instant with a single blow, even an ordinary half-step domain ancestor of the Ten Thousand Things Realm would be killed by Ye Tian with one blow.

Therefore, except for the Dragon Shadow Palace Master and the Thunder Tribulation Palace Master, the other Palace Masters did not dare to approach at all, let alone arrest Ouyang Jiu'er.

......

"Brother Ye's strength is so strong!"

Ouyang Jiu'er was shocked.

Crushing a Returning Realm Half-Step Domain Ancestor like the Thunder Tribulation Palace Master was almost comparable to her father's strength.

At the beginning, her father also had the strength of the top Returning One Realm half-step domain ancestor, but unfortunately he fell unexpectedly and died in the end, otherwise her father would probably be a domain ancestor today.

Burst!

The body of the Thunder Tribulation Palace Lord was pierced, and his injuries gradually worsened.

At this time, Ye Tian threatened: "Thunder Tribulation Palace Master, don't you retreat, otherwise if I attack the other palace masters of your Heavenly Emperor Palace, you can't stop it, if you don't want the Heavenly Emperor Palace to leave only the two of you palace masters, get out of me immediately!"

The Thunder Tribulation Palace Master was very angry, but he was really afraid that Ye Tian would do this.

As a result, the Thunder Tribulation Palace Master retreated.

"Dragon Shadow Palace Master, let's go, I can't catch the Cold Moon Palace Lord today!"

The Thunder Tribulation Palace Lord said.

"Let's go!"

The Dragon Shadow Palace Master also said helplessly.

With Ye Tian here, they are not opponents at all, and there is no way to capture the Cold Moon Palace Master.

Ye Tian didn't chase down the Dragon Shadow Palace Master and the Thunder Tribulation Palace Master anymore, although he could beat them, it was more difficult to kill them.

At the level of the Unified Realm, even if the gap between each other's fight is a bit big, it is difficult to kill each other.

Moreover, Ye Tian's Extreme Dao power could not be used infinitely, although it lasted longer than when the Invincible Dao Ancestor was inadvertent, but the time was still not long.

Therefore, it was impossible for him to continue to fight with the Dragon Shadow Palace Master and the Thunder Tribulation Palace Master.

After the Dragon Shadow Palace Master and the Thunder Tribulation Palace Master left, Ouyang Jiu'er came to Ye Tian and thanked him, "Brother Ye, thank you!"

"We are friends, we should save you!" Ye Tian said with a smile.

Subsequently, he learned from Ouyang Jiu'er how she was discovered.

I have to say that Ouyang Jiu'er's luck was a little worse.

This forbidden void realm has been discovered, it is not safe for Ouyang Jiu'er to continue to live here, in case Ye Tian retreats and cultivates in the future, Ouyang Jiu'er will not be able to resist the attack of the Heavenly Emperor Palace.

Therefore, Ye Tian invited: "Jiu'er, you go to the human realm, the human realm is also a medium forbidden void realm, it is safer for you to cultivate there." The Heavenly Emperor Palace would never dare to invade the human realm, unless they were looking for death!"

"Good!"

Ouyang Jiu'er agreed.

Originally, she lived in the human world, and now she just went back.

Subsequently, Ouyang Jiu'er and Ye Tian returned to the human world.

---------------

Heavenly Emperor's Palace.

The Dragon Shadow Palace Lord and the Thunder Tribulation Palace Lord are furious.

"Damn, the Ten Thousand Laws Dao Ancestor turned out to be a friend of the Cold Moon Palace Lord!"

"Sooner or later, I will kill the Ten Thousand Law Dao Ancestors, and even sabotage us to capture the Lord of the Cold Moon Palace!"

"Hehe, killing the Ten Thousand Law Dao Ancestor, he is already comparable to the combat power of the top Returning One Realm half-step domain ancestor, and in the near future, he may be able to compete with the ultimate combat power of the One Realm like the Wind Mountain Lord, he will kill us almost the same!"

"What should I do, just let go of the Cold Moon Palace Master?"

"What else can we do besides this, unless we can break through to the Domain Ancestor level, but this is not something that can be done in a short period of time. "

"Forget it, when the forbidden world is born, let's bring the Mighty Sea Ancestor here, once the Vast Sea Ancestor comes, the Ten Thousand Laws Dao Ancestor will not be able to protect the Cold Moon Palace Master, and the Ten Thousand Laws Dao Ancestor will also have to die at that time!"

The Dragon Shadow Palace Lord and the Thunder Tribulation Palace Lord discussed for a while, and they no longer thought about the Cold Moon Palace Master.

Anyway, they couldn't defeat the Ten Thousand Law Dao Ancestors, so they could only give up arresting the Cold Moon Palace Master for the time being.

Flash.

Tens of millions of years have passed, and the human race has begun to give birth to more invincible Dao Ancestors one after another, and the half-step domain ancestors of Black Wind Mountain have gradually begun to be born, making up for the original losses.

It is worth mentioning that the original Wind King, and now the Xuanfeng Dao Ancestor has also been promoted to the half-step domain ancestor level.

It's a pity that the Fire King fell in the Devouring Clan's battle, and the Supreme Dao Ancestor and the Invincible Dao Ancestor that Ye Tian was more familiar with at the beginning fell a lot, and there were only a few familiar people left, and the Wind King was one of them.

And Ye Tian, after thousands of years of penance, coupled with the assistance of the Eternal Source Stone Statue, finally raised the Forbidden Dao to the point where he was close to breaking through.

He is about to elevate the Forbidden Dao to the level of the realm of all things.

Once the Forbidden Dao breaks through to the Forbidden Dao, he will be the true Half-Step Domain Ancestor of the Ten Thousand Things Realm, and at that time, his combat power will probably really be comparable to the Half-Step Domain Ancestor of the Returning One Realm's extreme combat power.
